form.formComment: At the latest run ran last in a small field at Te Aroha on March 28 over 1150m, on heavy track; 3 len behind Cleat carrying 53kg at $4.90. Before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 10 at Tauranga on March 14 over 1200m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Churchillian with 54kg at $16.80. Well placed. Key runner on his best form and can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of nine weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Tauherenikau February 6 over 1300m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Gohugo with 54kg at $6.20. When resuming last campaign third of 10 at Trentham December 6 over 1000m, soft track; 0.9 len behind The Perfect One with 60kg at $4.20. Capable of a bold return.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign by nose Wanganui November 29 over 1600m slow track defeating Carter John with 58.5kg at $5.90. When resuming last campaign second of 10 at Waverley October 19 over 1200m, soft track; 0.8 len behind Classy Brahma with 58.5kg at $3. Looks all set for a bright return.
